messages.quote: Within this MVP, the borrower remains in the quotable range; the spread can be used as an indicative pricing starting point.
messages.manual_review: Indicative quote only. The borrower should be escalated to credit committee / senior underwriter review before any real offer.
messages.decline: Indicative distressed quote only. In normal banking workflow this name would likely be declined or restructured rather than automatically priced.
